name: Procurement Approval — eval set
description: Eval set for the Procurement Approval Agent. Covers the full prerequisite-blocker matrix from procurement-prerequisites/scripts/tools.py: budget threshold (under/over), certification chain (missing InTouch refs, excess cert hours), regulatory clearance (export-control deny list), and graceful degradation on malformed plans. Live evals run against PROCUREMENT_APPROVAL_AGENT_RESOURCE_NAME via :streamQuery.

parts.text:
Please review this SourcingPlan for procurement approval. Authorization tier: standard.
